top_strength: Perfect Clock section and a comprehensive, accurate estimate for a complex two-day pack-and-move — pricing, time, crew, and truck details all delivered clearly.
coaching_note: Save Your Ass was completely absent and the rep did not attempt to book today — these two misses cost 18 points combined.
phone_presence_notes: Natural, confident tone with good use of 'Larry' by name, warm farewell, and the customer stayed engaged.
